exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your immigration journey forward
items: Research and document eligibility requirements for your specific immigration category
Create a detailed timeline and budget for your immigration process including all fees
Gather and organize all required personal documents and obtain certified translations where needed
Schedule and complete all required medical examinations with authorized civil surgeons
Research and consult with qualified immigration attorneys to understand your options and potential challenges
Create a comprehensive filing system and backup all immigration documents digitally and physically
